title: Vanessa Carlysle
content:
{{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=''Deadpool'' or ''Deadpool 2''}} {{Character |image = Vanessa Carlysle.png |real name = Vanessa {{Conjecture|Geraldine}} Carlysle[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RGBpp2utdJw Morena Baccarin On Wade and Vanessa's Complicated Relationship in Deadpool & Wolverine] |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |DOD = [[2010s/Earth-10005#2018|Early 2018]] ([[Cable's Time-Travel Device|Undone]] by [[Deadpool]]) |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Morena Baccarin]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Your crazy matches my crazy.|Vanessa Carlysle to [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''Vanessa {{Conjecture|Geraldine}} Carlysle''' is the ex-fiancée of [[Wade Wilson]]. ==Biography== {{MD|Vanessa Carlysle (Earth-10005 Revised)||1}} ===Relationship with Wade Wilson=== ====Meeting Wade Wilson==== {{Quote|You had a girlfriend?"
"Yeah, Vanessa, we met when she was a dancer.|[[Wolverine]] and [[Deadpool]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} [[File:When Vanessa Met Wade.png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle approaches [[Wade Wilson]] at a bar]] Vanessa Carlysle was a stripper that approached [[Wade Wilson]] at a bar. The two engaged in intense sexual activity and begun a relationship. Both deeply in love with each other, Wilson proposed to Carlysle, telling her that her crazy matched his crazy. But their happiness was cut short when Wilson was diagnosed with cancer. Carlysle tried to support Wilson, but he abandoned her. [[File:Vanessa reunites with Deadpool.png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle being reunited with [[Wade Wilson]]]] Having been on her own for a while, Carlysle was kidnapped by [[Ajax]], who placed her in an oxygen deprivation chamber. Wilson arrived to save Carlysle, having gone through a mutation that stopped his cancer from killing him. Working alongside [[Colossus]] and [[Negasonic Teenage Warhead]], Wilson was able to save Carlysle and kill Ajax. After the fight, Carlysle reunited with Wilson, and she discovered that his entire body had been disfigured. Carlysle decided to get back together with Wilson.{{Ref|DW}} ====Death==== [[File:Vanessa Death.png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle is killed by [[Sergei Valishnikov]]]] {{Quote|Is this because I used {{WPS|Cable (character)#Film|Cable}}'s [[Cable's Time-Travel Device|time machine]]? Brought a couple of people back alive and then destroyed it.|[[Wade Wilson]] to [[Mr. Paradox]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} While at home with [[Wade Wilson]], Carlysle was killed in an attack by [[Sergei Valishnikov]], an enemy of Wilson. [[File:Wade and Vanessa Afterlife.png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle and [[Wade Wilson]] in the afterlife]] In the afterlife, Carlysle would eventually be joined by Wilson, and the two embraced, now getting to spend eternity with each other. However, Wilson was unable to stay in the afterlife. But, Wilson was able to acquire [[Cable's Time-Travel Device]] and used it to go back in time and prevent Carlysle from being killed by killing Valishnikov first. Carlysle then witnessed as Wilson used the Time-Travel Device again.{{Ref|DW}} ====Breakup==== [[File:Wade and Vanessa break up.png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle attempting to support [[Wade Wilson]]]] {{Quote|Ever since [[Avengers|they]] turned you down, you took a knee... baby, you never got back up. I know you're going through something. Let me go through it with you.|Vanessa Carlysle to [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Shortly after the attack, their relationship began to strain as Carlysle wanted [[Wade Wilson]] to turn things around in his life. After Wilson was rejected from the [[Avengers]], he became depressed, so Carlysle talked to him about how he was distant. [[File:Vanessa break up.png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle is forced to end her relationship]] Wilson asked how he could change that, so Carlysle told him to show her he cared about something bigger than himself. Carlysle understood that Wilson was struggling after his rejection, so she told him that she wanted to help him through this tough time, repeating what he said to her when he proposed. However, Wilson decided to push Carlysle away by telling her to admit she did not want to be with him anymore. As a result, Carlysle decided to end her relationship with Wilson.{{Ref|DW}} ====Moving Forward==== [[File:Deadpool & Wolverine Everyone (8).png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle with all of [[Wade Wilson]]'s friends]] {{Quote|[[Dermot|He]]'s kind. Likes to go hiking. Hasn't got me shot yet."
"Well, it's the early days.|Vanessa Carlysle and [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Six years after breaking up, Carlysle, who got a new job and had been promoted to middle management, met [[Dermot]], a coworker, and they began to date. Still remaining friends with [[Wade Wilson]], Carlysle was invited to his birthday party at his [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]], along with the rest of his friends. [[File:Vanessa and Wade.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle at [[Wade Wilson]]'s birthday party]] During the party, Carlysle and Wilson caught up and she talked about her job. Wilson asked if she was seeing anyone, so Carlysle told him about Dermot, jokingly remarking that he hadn't gotten her shot yet. Carlysle enquired about Wilson's dating situation, and he deflected by mentioning that he shares a bed with [[Blind Al]], which they both laughed at. Wilson made a speech, telling his friends how much he loved them, and he lingered when looking at Carlysle, who smiled back at him. She then patted Wilson on the shoulder and told him to make a wish, referring to him as "buddy."{{Ref|DW}} ====Rekindled Romance==== [[File:Wade Wilson and Vanessa Carlysle.png|{{AltFloat}}|Carlysle decides to take back [[Wade Wilson]]]] {{Quote|You've been [[Preservation of Earth-10005|busy]]."
"I did it for you. Even if you don't want me, I did it for you.|Vanessa Carlysle and [[Wade Wilson]]|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Sometime after [[Wade Wilson]]'s birthday party, Carlysle, along with all of his friends were once again invited to his [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]] for dinner. As they all sat at the table, Wilson spoke with Carlysle, who commented on his [[Preservation of Earth-10005|recent activity]] saving the [[Multiverse]]. Wilson told her that he did it for her, which Carlysle was touched by, and she held Wilson's hand. The two then got back together and continued their relationship.{{Ref|DW}} ==Relationships== {{col-begin}}{{col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Ex-Fiancé, Savior and Love Interest *[[Buck]] *[[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] **[[Colossus|Piotr Rasputin/Colossus]] **[[Negasonic Teenage Warhead|Ellie Phimister/Negasonic Teenage Warhead]] **[[Yukio]] *[[Dopinder]] *[[Blind Al]] *[[Peter Wisdom]] *[[Shatterstar|Rusty/Shatterstar]] *[[Dermot]] - Colleague and Ex-Boyfriend *[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] *[[X-23|X-23/Laura]] *[[Dogpool|Mary Puppins/Dogpool]] {{col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Ajax|Francis Freeman/Ajax]] † - Kidnapper and Attempted Killer *[[Sergei Valishnikov]] † - Attempted Killer {{col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Vanessa Carlysle, also known as '''Copycat''', is a [[mutant]] with the ability to shape-shift as well as to copy any power from another individual after a period of physical contact. She was a member of {{WPS|X-Force#Film|X-Force}}. *In {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Vanessa Carlysle was a stripper who met and fell in love with [[Wade Wilson]]. However, when Wilson found out he had terminal cancer, he left her. A year later, Carlysle was kidnapped by [[Ajax]], but saved by Wilson, who showed Carlysle that he was disfigured. Carlysle still stayed with him. Later, Carlysle became engaged to Wilson, only for an enemy of Wilson to kill her. Eventually, Wilson used [[Cable's Time-Travel Device]] to save Carlysle. ==Behind the Scenes== *Vanessa Carlysle in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was portrayed by [[Morena Baccarin]]. ==References== {{Gallery|Vanessa Carlysle/Gallery}} {{Wq}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Vanessa Carlysle (Earth-10005 Revised)}} *{{WP}} [[es:Vanessa Carlysle]] [[pt-br:Vanessa Carlysle]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Resurrected Characters]]

infobox.real name: Vanessa {{Conjecture|Geraldine}} Carlysle<ref>[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RGBpp2utdJw Morena Baccarin On Wade and Vanessa's Complicated Relationship in Deadpool & Wolverine]</ref>
